items.description: A shopper discovers, configures, purchases, receives, and can recover or return an evidence-backed product in a bounded local Amazon shopping simulation. The freeze covers anonymous Singapore/USD source evidence plus local account journeys; it explicitly denies whole-marketplace or whole-site fidelity.

readiness.label: Required public artifacts
readiness.detail: Frozen purpose, routes, journeys, checkpoints, coverage, and asset closure

readiness.label: Clone artifact
readiness.detail: Runnable isolated offline reference server

readiness.label: User journeys
readiness.detail: 3 frozen success, failure, and recovery journeys

readiness.label: Visual checkpoints
readiness.detail: 16 route-state-viewport checkpoints

readiness.label: Legacy verifier report
readiness.detail: Acceptance report is current and all release gates passed

readiness.label: Visual evidence companion
readiness.detail: 2 sanitized source/reference pairs

readiness.label: Seed and reset
readiness.detail: Managed by the offline-clone harness rather than the candidate scoring contract

readiness.label: Controlled time
readiness.detail: Deterministic local simulations are certified by acceptance evidence

readiness.label: License and assets
readiness.detail: Research evidence remains subject to source-owner rights and publication review

readiness.label: Official candidate report
readiness.detail: 0 valid agent experiment runs

readiness.label: Scoring contract
readiness.detail: Agent scoring remains intentionally empty until experiments start

route_families.route_pattern: real SMTP, payments, fulfillment, telemetry, ads, and third-party seller systems

journeys.actor: anonymous shopper becoming a verified local account
steps: discover a quoted product through home, search, a department, or Deals
open the local PDP and choose a complete source-quoted option combination
add multiple sibling variants without overwriting either cart line
sign in or register and verify the local email flow
select an owned address and supported delivery option
choose an approved local sandbox card or bank method
place the order once with server re-quotation and idempotency
refresh order history and progress the local shipment to delivered
create or update a local review whose Verified Purchase flag is server-derived

journeys.actor: shopper encountering invalid or stale input
steps: see option values with no reachable quote disabled before selection
have forged ASIN, option, quantity, owner, and cross-origin mutations rejected
receive a deterministic declined sandbox payment without an order or funds claim
have stale cart or checkout state re-quoted and reconciled instead of silently committed
retry a duplicate place-order action without creating a second order

journeys.actor: shopper recovering identity, payment, or post-order state
steps: enter an unknown sign-in email and continue through registration
verify the email locally or exercise bounded SMTP delivery and retry states
request password recovery without account enumeration
switch from declined card to an approved sandbox method
cancel before fulfillment or request a return after simulated delivery
refresh and observe durable cancelled, returned, or refunded state
